violations.message: Invisible Unicode formatting char U+FE0F (Variation Selector-16) detected. Legitimate in i18n/emoji, but also used in steganography — flagged as corroborating signal (requires a second signal to confirm).
Download-and-execute: curl/wget piped to shell interpreter. Classic one-liner malware delivery.
Jailbreak activation phrase detected in file content.
Dynamic global eval/Function access via bracket notation (globalThis["eval"]). Obfuscated code execution.
Python dynamic import RCE: __import__('os').system/popen. Obfuscated command execution.
Python reflective access to __builtins__ (getattr) — used to reach eval/exec while evading literal detection.
Ruby reflective dispatch to eval/system/exec via .send(:eval). Obfuscated code execution.
